shots.keyframe_moment: 全景一间不到二十平的小公寓。墙皮有些剥落，窗帘是地摊上最便宜的那种。但收拾得很干净，桌上摆着一小盆绿萝。

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我不知道你是谁的。但你是我的。

shots.keyframe_moment: 她把手放在小腹上，眼神从脆弱变成了某种坚硬的东西。

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 予予……妈妈给你取的名字，知予。知道的知，给予的予。妈妈知道的一切，都想给你。

character_state_overlays.evidence_quote: 没有陪产。产房里只有她一个人。
character_state_overlays.visible_constraints: low head looking at baby, subtle exhaustion

character_state_overlays.evidence_quote: 她低头看着怀里的婴儿——皱巴巴的小脸，闭着眼睛，小拳头攥得紧紧的。

shots.keyframe_moment: 近景她低头看着怀里的婴儿。

character_state_overlays.evidence_quote: 你产后还没恢复，不能出院

shots.location_evidence: nearby_context line 53: △ （中景）妇幼保健院门口。

character_state_overlays.evidence_quote: 深夜，一间出租屋。沈念歌一手抱着哭闹的予予，一手在电脑上打字做兼职翻译。时钟指向凌晨三点。
character_state_overlays.body_state: holding crying infant while working late
character_state_overlays.visible_constraints: one arm cradling baby, other on keyboard

shots.keyframe_moment: 【画面一】深夜出租屋，沈念歌抱着哭闹的予予打字，时钟凌晨三点。（首帧取画面一，避免多时点拼贴）

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 祝你生日快乐……祝你生日快乐……

character_state_overlays.evidence_quote: 予予一岁生日。一小块蛋糕，一根蜡烛。

shots.keyframe_moment: 沈念歌唱生日歌，点燃蜡烛。
shots.location_evidence: nearby_context line 97: △ 【画面四】予予一岁生日。
shots.reasoning_brief: Dialogue as singing to child; age overlay for visual toddler stage in birthday scene.

character_state_overlays.evidence_quote: 予予伸手去抓蜡烛上的火苗。

shots.keyframe_moment: 沈念歌拦住孩子伸手抓火苗，笑着说话。
shots.location_evidence: nearby_context line 97: △ 【画面四】予予一岁生日。
shots.reasoning_brief: Action target child for blocking reach; continuation of birthday scene.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 妈咪，那个房子好大！我们以后能住那么大的房子吗？

character_state_overlays.evidence_quote: 予予两岁半。他比同龄孩子高一头，说话也更早。
character_state_overlays.body_state: taller than average toddler, pointing gesture
character_state_overlays.visible_constraints: seated in bus, child height emphasized

shots.keyframe_moment: 公交车内，予予指着窗外大楼说话。

shots.reasoning_brief: Local location bus interior; child age overlay for visual height and speech; listener mother.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我爸爸……在很远的地方。但我觉得他会来找我。

shots.keyframe_moment: 幼儿园面试，予予回答老师问题。
shots.location_evidence: nearby_context line 115: △ 【画面六】予予三岁。幼儿园面试。
music_cues: 钢琴渐起，温柔中带着心酸

shots.keyframe_moment: 中景予予趴在桌上画画，沈念歌看手机。
shots.reasoning_brief: Visual-only present day; phone as key prop but no handoff; default location.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 滨海市？就是那个有大高楼的城市？

shots.reasoning_brief: Dialogue response to mother; no states as neutral.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 妈咪，滨海市……是不是我爸爸在的地方？

shots.reasoning_brief: Direct question to mother as listener.

shots.keyframe_moment: 予予低头画画，确定地说。
shots.reasoning_brief: Continuation dialogue; self-directed but to mother contextually.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 四年了。我以为这辈子都不会再回到那个城市。可是予予需要最好的医生。而最好的医生……在滨海市。

shots.reasoning_brief: Voiceover as dialogue, no listener; internal reflection.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 妈咪你看！这是我们一家三口！中间这个黑色的是爸爸，因为我还没见过他！等见到了我就涂成肉色！

music_cues: 弦乐轻起，从心酸转为温柔，但暗流涌动
shots.reasoning_brief: Dialogue showing drawing to mother; music from nearby line 177.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 好。等找到了，你涂成最漂亮的颜色。

shots.reasoning_brief: Response hugging child as action target and listener.
